_description: Baseline for the evals CI gate. Average scores from runEvals + a hand-picked dataset. A run whose averages drop by more than tolerance_percent fails evals-check.
_notes: 25% tolerance accommodates LLM judge jitter. Scorer outputs vary between runs on the same dataset — design for 'is the agent still roughly as good as the last baseline' not 'identical'. Keys match Mastra's prebuilt scorer ids verbatim: answer-relevancy-scorer, completeness-scorer.
